# Acme Corp

Acme Corp is a mid-market energy company working to meet its first public climate commitments with a robust GHG inventory. The current engagement focuses on establishing a credible Scope 1 & 2 carbon baseline ahead of the June board meeting, with supplier engagement already underway to scope Scope 3 coverage in a future phase. Jane Okoye (Head of Sustainability) and Dani Ferreira (Procurement) are the primary day-to-day contacts driving cross-functional data collection.

The wider buying and influence map spans the executive team and the shop floor. COO Reema Sharma holds the budget alongside CFO Victor Lin — the engagement's most influential skeptic — while sustainability, procurement, and facilities all report up to Reema. Data lead Omar Haddad is the quiet swing vote who can move Victor; General Counsel Laura Pace gates the disclosure language; Investor Relations head Tomás Rivera supplies the investor rationale; and on the operational side Facilities Manager Grace Bello and plant manager Ken Mueller own the Scope 1 data the inventory depends on.
